title: 1 step DFU - Settings/Update tab both on the lates
scenario: Verify that navigating to Fab/Settings/SW Update shows "Up to date" with no update available when Osprey, EB, and CC are on the latest versions.
steps: Ensure Osprey, EB, and CC are all on the latest versions.
expected: The screen should display "Up to date" with no update available.
